---
title: "Ethereum to Aptos Guide"
description: "A step-by-step guide for EVM developers moving from Solidity and Ethers patterns to Move, Objects, and the Aptos TypeScript SDK."
sidebar:
  label: "Overview"
---

import { Aside, CardGrid, LinkCard } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

This guide migrates the old Aptos Learn Ethereum workshop into aptos.dev and updates the technical guidance to match the current Aptos stack.

It is written for developers who already understand Solidity, EVM storage, `msg.sender`, ERC standards, and Ethers-style transaction flows.

## What you will learn

- How Aptos accounts, resources, and objects differ from EVM contract storage.
- How to map Solidity patterns to Move modules, entry functions, and view functions.
- How to use the current [`@aptos-labs/ts-sdk`](/build/sdks/ts-sdk), [Wallet Adapter](/build/sdks/wallet-adapter), and [Forklift](/build/sdks/forklift) tooling stack.
- How to port two concrete examples: a simple billboard contract and a richer Dutch auction flow.

<Aside type="tip" title="Keep the cheatsheet open">
  Use the [Ethereum to Aptos cheatsheet](/build/get-started/ethereum-cheatsheet) as your quick reference while you work through the chapters below.
</Aside>

## Suggested reading order

<CardGrid>
  <LinkCard href="/build/guides/ethereum-to-aptos/theory/introduction" title="Theory" description="Start with accounts, storage, objects, and the up-to-date TypeScript SDK transaction flow." />

  <LinkCard href="/build/guides/ethereum-to-aptos/billboard/demo" title="Billboard Walkthrough" description="Port a small message-board style contract from Solidity to Move." />

  <LinkCard href="/build/guides/ethereum-to-aptos/dutch-auction/demo" title="Dutch Auction Walkthrough" description="Study a larger example covering Objects, Digital Assets, Fungible Assets, and auction logic." />
</CardGrid>

## Prerequisites

- Familiarity with Solidity and common ERC-20 / ERC-721 patterns.
- Basic Aptos tooling setup:
  - [Aptos CLI](/build/cli)
  - [TypeScript SDK](/build/sdks/ts-sdk)
  - [Wallet Adapter](/build/sdks/wallet-adapter)
- For hands-on contract development, prefer [Forklift](/build/sdks/forklift) for the developer workflow and the CLI for direct Move commands.

## Source code references

- Billboard example:
  - [Solidity](https://github.com/aptos-labs/move-by-examples/tree/main/billboard/solidity)
  - [Move](https://github.com/aptos-labs/move-by-examples/tree/main/billboard/move)
- Dutch auction example:
  - [Move by Examples: Dutch Auction](https://github.com/aptos-labs/move-by-examples/tree/main/dutch-auction)
